tasks.title: Xcode project scaffold + domain/model type contract freeze
acceptance_criteria: Xcode project + app target + CampfireTests target build with an empty scaffold that compiles
every type in the tech_specs interfaces-json exists with the exact locked signature
Resources/, Features/, Services/, Polish/, DesignSystem/ folder groups exist and are added to the target so later tasks only append file refs, never restructure groups
design token baseline (gradient stops, scrim, typography, spacing, motion timings) is present as a compiling file other lanes can import

tasks.title: GameRulesEngine + PlayerSetupValidation + domain tests
acceptance_criteria: nextActivePlayerIndex and nextTarget pass tests at 2, 3, 4, and 15 players with zero self-target and zero immediate-repeat violations
shufflePromptOrder produces a deterministic-length sequence covering all prompt IDs exactly once
deriveRecap correctly returns standout, tie, lowVariance, and zeroData cases against constructed revealedRounds fixtures
PlayerSetupValidation rejects blank/whitespace names per-row and enforces the 2-15 bound with no auto-fix
zero SwiftData or SwiftUI imports anywhere in this task's files

tasks.title: TransitionGuard + DebugFailureInjector (standalone, decoupled)
acceptance_criteria: TransitionGuard.tryLock() returns true exactly once until unlock() is called; a unit test fires it twice rapidly and asserts only the first succeeds
DebugFailureInjector exposes toggleable flags (forceEmptyPromptPack, forceRecapRenderFailure) defaulting to false/off in release builds
zero dependency on SessionViewModel, ModelContainer, or any SwiftUI type so services_utilities tasks can consult the failure-injector seam from day one

tasks.title: Session SwiftData model finalize + persistence round-trip spike
acceptance_criteria: Session is a concrete @Model class matching the locked interfaces-json shape exactly

spike test writes a Session containing a non-trivial RecapOutcome (tie or standout case) via one ModelContainer and reads it back via a second, independently constructed ModelContainer against the same store URL

pass/fail result and, if failed, the chosen fallback is recorded in a comment at the top of Session.swift; no fallback-conversion file is created anywhere in this task — any needed conversion lives only inside SessionViewModel (T-007), never in a services_utilities adapter

tasks.title: ModelContainerProvider with in-memory fallback
acceptance_criteria: makeContainer() returns .success or .failure, never throws uncaught
on simulated store failure, caller can construct a valid in-memory-only container so the app still reaches Entry with a visible starting-fresh notice
no reference to AppCoordinator or any Features/ type

tasks.title: AppRoute + AppCoordinator
acceptance_criteria: AppRoute is exactly {entry, setup, session, recap} with no NavigationStack anywhere in the session flow
resumeInProgressSessionIfAny(context:) is its own tested path: given a persisted mid-round Session fixture, it routes straight to .session with the exact persisted phase, not .entry
activeError surfaces CampfireError.storeUnavailable distinctly from the other two cases

tasks.title: SessionViewModel: transitions, synchronous save, termination proof, double-tap integration, persistence-fallback conversion (if needed)
acceptance_criteria: every mutating method (beginHandoff, advancePastHandoff, revealTarget, advanceRound, endSessionEarly) calls try context.save() synchronously immediately after mutation, no Task-wrapped saves

two-independent-ModelContainer termination test: write mid-round state through container A, reopen container B from the same file URL, assert exact roundPhase/activePlayerIndex/revealedRounds equivalence
revealTarget is wrapped by TransitionGuard from T-003; a rapid double-invocation test asserts exactly one revealedRounds append and one haptic-trigger call

target selection and recap derivation are delegated entirely to GameRulesEngine calls, no reimplemented logic in the view model; if T-004's spike failed, the scalar-conversion step lives here and only here

tasks.title: Curated prompt pack content + PromptRepository + ContentAccessProvider wiring + editorial QA sign-off
acceptance_criteria: free_pack.json contains at least 40 genuinely distinct, editorially-reviewed reveal prompts appropriate for a mixed-generation room, no repeated/templated phrasing

loadDefaultPackIfNeeded decodes the bundle into PromptPackRecord on first launch and throws CampfireError.emptyPromptPack (surfaced via DebugFailureInjector.forceEmptyPromptPack or a genuinely empty decode) rather than crashing
isPackUnlocked(_:) is actually called at the real prompt-retrieval call site in activePrompts(for:context:), not merely declared
PackQA.md is signed off with a duplicate check, tone matrix, and family-safe edge-case review before this task is marked done, and recap copy may not be marked complete until this artifact exists

tasks.title: HapticsService + RecapCardRenderer
acceptance_criteria: handoffBuzz() and revealBeat() fire distinct, correctly-typed haptic generators; setEnabled(false) suppresses both
renderImage(for:) renders RecapCardView at a fixed 9:16 frame via ImageRenderer at 3x scale after a confirmed layout pass, returning .success(imageData) or .failure
DebugFailureInjector.forceRecapRenderFailure deterministically forces the .failure branch for testing
no persisted image blob written anywhere — render is on-demand only

tasks.title: Shared design components + ConfettiOverlay
acceptance_criteria: gradient stops and the scrim token pass WCAG AA contrast against white text at the pink end specifically, not just the orange end
ModeTile has an active/tappable variant and a non-interactive coming-soon variant with accessibilityHint("Not available yet") and no tap target
ConfettiOverlay tears itself down within 700ms of isActive going true and never redraws on a subsequent round without a fresh trigger
ErrorStateView(message:, retryAction:) is the one reusable error component every screen uses; primary_ui screens consume these components but never edit these files

tasks.title: Entry + Setup screens
acceptance_criteria: Entry renders Reveal as tappable and the other two tiles as ModeTile's non-interactive coming-soon variant
Setup rejects blank/whitespace names with an inline per-row error, disables continue with a stated reason below 2 or above 15 players, and never auto-fixes
cold launch to Entry renders in under 1 second in a manual timing check

tasks.title: Session round screen (handoff / ready / revealed)
acceptance_criteria: target identity is never rendered before the reveal tap fires; the reveal tap and the confetti/haptic beat happen on the same frame
HandoffBanner auto-advances after ~1.5s with a haptic buzz and is skippable by a tap anywhere before then
isIdleTimerDisabled is true from setup-complete through session-end and reset to false on every exit path including early-exit-on-empty-pack
RoundStateHeader truncates correctly at accessibility-size Dynamic Type with a long all-caps test name, verified against a defined wrap rule, not an assumed fit

tasks.title: Recap screen + ShareLink
acceptance_criteria: loading state is a real spinner (not a blank flash) while renderImage(for:) runs
on RecapRenderResult.failure, a readable fallback text summary plus a Retry action is shown, remaining shareable even without the image
a pre-share note states player names leave the device once shared
ShareLink opens the system share sheet with the rendered image, verified on a physical device

tasks.title: App entry glue (CampfireApp.swift)
acceptance_criteria: @main App struct constructs the ModelContainer via ModelContainerProvider, calls resumeInProgressSessionIfAny on launch, and hosts AppCoordinator's route as the single root switch
a forced ModelContainerProvider failure still reaches Entry with a visible starting-fresh notice instead of crashing

tasks.title: Error-injection reachability, accessibility, and stability manual sweep
acceptance_criteria: documents a real, performed 2-player and 12-15-player playthrough each including one background and one force-quit at each of handoff/ready/revealed, with zero ambiguous state on resume
documents the emptyPromptPack and recapRenderFailure paths fired via DebugFailureInjector and confirms each reaches a recoverable, non-dead-end screen
documents VoiceOver reading order on the round-screen header and confirms both coming-soon tiles are announced as unavailable, never as live controls
any bug found is logged with the owning task id, not silently patched in this task's own files

tasks.title: Integration audit + release package
acceptance_criteria: signed pass/fail log covering every gate from project_plan with an explicit go/no-go per item
written known-limitations note stating StoreKit entitlement is deferred and isPackUnlocked remains a stub
confirms a full offline session (all CampfireError-relevant paths plus the happy path) reaches recap with a working on-device share, with no unreachable or dead-end error state
